response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief C++ exposure in academic or minor roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility with diverse tech exposure
Active open-source contributor and technical educator
Proven experience in distributed systems and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: No demonstrated 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks experience in cloud compute platform leadership or architecture
No evidence of mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers in a technical lead capacity
